company: New York State Electric & Gas Corporation and Rochester Gas and Electric Corporation
source: New York State Department of Public Service
doc_type: comprehensive management & operations audit final report (independent auditor, PSL §66(19))
source_note: NorthStar Consulting Group's independent Comprehensive Management and Operations Audit of New York State Electric & Gas Corporation (NYSEG) and Rochester Gas and Electric Corporation (RG&E) — the Avangrid-owned utilities — under PSL §66(19), Case 23-M-0103 (439 pp). Report dated February 4, 2025; publicly released by PSC Order Releasing Audit Report on May 15, 2025. The auditor makes 128 recommendations; key findings include that Avangrid's complex corporate structure (13 affiliates) obscures whether allocated charges follow cost causation, and that NYSEG failed enforceable reliability standards for six consecutive years. Page 1 verified: 'A COMPREHENSIVE MANAGEMENT AND OPERATIONS AUDIT OF NEW YORK STATE ELECTRIC & GAS CORPORATION AND ROCHESTER GAS & ELECTRIC CORPORATION CASE 23-M-0103 FINAL REPORT ... FEBRUARY 4, 2025 NORTHSTAR CONSULTING GROUP'. Harvested from the NY DPS Document & Matter Management (DMM) system. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: NY DPS DMM (documents.dps.ny.gov/public/Common/ViewDoc.aspx?DocRefId={3097E996-0000-C45D-8AB2-101DC6B879E5}).

company: Long Island Power Authority and PSEG Long Island, LLC
source: New York State Department of Public Service
doc_type: comprehensive management & operations audit final report (independent auditor, LIPA Reform Act)
source_note: NorthStar Consulting Group's independent Comprehensive Management and Operations Audit of the Long Island Power Authority (LIPA) and its service provider PSEG Long Island, LLC — Matter No. 21-00618, conducted for the NY DPS under the LIPA Reform Act (569 pp). Final report dated March 22, 2024; the audit makes 49 recommendations across core utility operations.
